name: Growth Plan
description: Design a structured growth plan: acquisition channels, retention strategy, metrics framework, experiment roadmap, and growth model.

outputs.name: growth_model
outputs.description: Growth engine type (viral, paid, content, sales) with rationale

outputs.name: channels
outputs.description: Top 3-5 acquisition channels ranked by expected ROI

outputs.name: retention_strategy
outputs.description: Retention tactics, activation milestones, and churn reduction

outputs.name: metrics
outputs.description: North star metric + supporting metrics framework

outputs.name: experiments
outputs.description: 5 growth experiments prioritized by ICE score
